title: Project
description: A SonarQube project (component) representing a codebase being analyzed for quality and security.

key.description: Unique project key (alphanumeric, dashes, underscores, dots)

lastAnalysisDate.description: Timestamp of the last successful analysis

revision.description: SCM revision hash of the last analyzed commit

managed.description: Whether the project is externally managed (via DevOps platform integration)

isAiCodeAssured.description: Whether AI code assurance is enabled for this project
